facts.containment: SCP-173 is to be kept in a locked container at all times.
facts.description: SCP-173 is a concrete sculpture of unknown origin. It is animate and extremely hostile.
facts.behavior: SCP-173 cannot move while within direct line of sight. Line of sight must not be broken at any time.
facts.danger: Object is reported to attack by snapping the neck at the base of the skull or by strangulation.
facts.maintenance: Personnel must maintain direct eye contact with SCP-173 until all personnel have vacated the container.
